title: Neural Networks Quiz
description: Test your neural network architecture and training knowledge.

questions.question: What does Dropout regularisation do during training?

options.text: Removes input features with low importance
Randomly sets a fraction of neurons to zero during each training step, preventing co-adaptation and reducing overfitting
Reduces the learning rate after each epoch
Drops entire training batches that have high loss

questions.question: Why do we call model.eval() before validation?

options.text: To disable Dropout and BatchNorm training behaviour, which should not be active during inference
To freeze all model weights permanently
To switch to a faster evaluation mode that skips weight updates

questions.question: What is the role of the activation function in a neural network?

options.text: To introduce non-linearity, enabling the network to learn complex patterns beyond simple linear relationships
To normalise input data before training
To calculate the loss between predictions and labels
